testcase.name: test_regular_save_deducts_stock

failure.message: AssertionError: Stock should be deducted for paid bill. Initial: 10, After: 10 assert 10 < 10

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_save_as_draft.py:261: in test_regular_save_deducts_stock assert stock_after_paid < initial_stock, f"Stock should be deducted for paid bill. Initial: {initial_stock}, After: {stock_after_paid}" E AssertionError: Stock should be deducted for paid bill. Initial: 10, After: 10 E assert 10 < 10
